visual_description: A group of people in dark, medieval-style clothing are running frantically across a courtyard as a massive explosion erupts behind them, sending flames and debris into the air. They are silhouetted against the bright fire, some shielding their heads or looking back in alarm as they flee toward a building. The scene is chaotic, with smoke billowing and the structure of a gothic-style building visible in the background.
